name: hr_recruiting_schema_driven_extraction
description: Restricted extraction schema for HR recruiting knowledge. Use this with LLM graph extraction tools to prevent uncontrolled graph growth.

nodes.label: Term
nodes.description: Controlled dictionary term, synonym group, typo variant or trucking/recruiting slang.

nodes.label: Intent
nodes.description: Business intent selected by the knowledge node.

nodes.label: Route
nodes.description: Route used by the assistant workflow.

nodes.label: Policy
nodes.description: Generation/safety policy that constrains public answers.

nodes.label: Topic
nodes.description: Internal topic bucket for RAG source selection.

nodes.label: InternalSource
nodes.description: Internal RAG document or structured fact source.

hard_rules: Do not create new Route or Policy nodes from candidate messages.
Do not create sensitive facts unless the candidate explicitly stated them.
Unknown candidate terms should become clarification candidates, not policies.
Recruiting facts such as pay, requirements and routes must come from InternalSource documents or controlled seed data.
Candidate-facing answers must never be generated directly from external web snippets.
